examples: The animals live in matriarchal groups.
Eh, Han Jia, they must have lived in a matriarchal society in the past.
The matriarchal society consists of her female offspring and their young.
The Mosuo society in China, is both matriarchal and matrilineal and marriage in the traditional sense do not exist.
Although the Gelede has nowadays adapted to a more patriarchal society, the oral heritage and dances can be considered as a testimony of the former matriarchal order.
